title: Sync @beskid packages across all platform sites

source.subject: Updated packages and their use across all sites

body:
Refresh `@beskid/*` consumers (site, auth, tracker, nexus) via GitHub Packages; hub launcher and shared UI aligned.

## What shipped

- Package sync across all sites (`870ef7b`)
- Tracker deployment + nexus hub entry (`49c49d7`)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`870ef7b`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/870ef7b)
- **Completed:** 2026-05-29

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `web-auth-web-common`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`
